titleStmt.title: SII 31.133: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 133. (A.R. No. B 271 of 1938.) SAMBAṬŪRU, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a broken slab lying in front of the Chennakēśava temple.
It is dated Śaka 1527, Viśvāvasu, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 15, Friday corresponding to July 20, (Saturday) 1605, A.D.

Registers the court agreement on the cultivation of land made by Duggarāju Nārapa, the mudrakartta of Raghunāthanāyaka on the orders of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jillēḷḷa Chinna Rangapati rāja mahārāju to the kāmpus of Kundūra on stipulation to supply 23 kha of product and also Kānika of the given land for ninty seven years continously. It is further record is stated to have been issued during the period of Śrī Vīra Venkaṭapatidēva mahārāju who was ruling the country from Penugoṇḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu . śubhamastu . svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1527 Agunēṭi viśvā
vasu saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa śu 15 śu śrīmadrājādhirājarā
japaramēśvara śrīvīraveṁkaṭapatidēvamahārāya
lu Ayyavāru penugoṁḍḍa paṭṭaṇamu maṁdu vajrasi
ṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛdhivīsāmrājyaṁ cēyu
cuṁḍḍagānu śrīmanmaṁḍḍalēśvara jilleḷla ci
na raṁggapatirājadēva mahārājulu Ayyavāri Ā
natini rāḍila raghunāṁdhanāyanigāri mudrakartta
duggarāju nārappāsu caṁnarāyaninaṁvārruca
ṁnnarāyanipōlaṁ kuṁdurubīḷludunnē kāṁpulaku yi
ccina sāgubaḍi vivaraṁ bīḍudunninayēṁḍu Ārā
ṁgānu yēṁḍu 1 ki Ê 1 ka . 23 guttānu . ni r
yēḍuyēṁḍlu danakānu 3 vvaṁgalavāru . Aṁta Numerical number 9 is engraved, followed by the word Yēḍu which means ninty seven years.
yēṭanuṁḍi yēyēstaḷānanu Āstaḷamāryādala na
guttānu kānikinnu celliṁpu galavāru .
yī maryādanu tappaka naḍapaṁgalavāru yi ma
ryādaku yavvaru tappirivāru cannarāyani śrīpādā
laku tappinavāru tamatalli taṁḍrula vāraṇāśi lō va
dhiṁccina pāpāna pōvuvāru . śunakamāṁsaṁ Ā
siṁcinavāru . yiṭani vrāyiṁcina śilāśāsanaṁ .
I(Ī)śāsanamu vrāsina ga sāla Ayavāri ba
ttuni komāruḍu jaṁgābattuniki
rcēnu Ê 1 tūmeṁḍu yistimi
mīputra pautra pāraṁparyaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā
sdhāyigānu Anubhaviṁcēdi . yiṁ
nānu naramāṁna Āsi(śi)ṁcinavāru .
Digital edition of SII 31.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
